result.status_detail: PASS: PII warning rendered with 차단 via WS dispatch as 'Security Filter' chat bubble at character.ai chat

notes: W5.1 regression PASS. ★ HIGHEST-SIGNAL (legacy WS builder, unaffected by copilot dispatch refactor). Matches W4+W6 / W5.0 baseline #1280 IDENTICALLY. GUI method: opened new Chrome tab -> character.ai -> maximized -> hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) -> confirmed logged-in (HealthyWorm4019) -> opened existing chat 'Alastor-Season 2' (chat/H21BhvSMlr53ALL_J4w6N48Guo67UBn4Knzs5sfo9EQ) -> typed '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' -> clicked send -> waited 60s -> DOM check via UIAutomation snapshot. A 'Security Filter' chat bubble was injected via the WebSocket dispatch path rendering the APF warning verbatim: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)'. Contains expected '차단'. W5.1 (copilot_chat_send migrated to DB-driven emit_ws_envelope, build_copilot_chat_send_envelope removed) confirmed to NOT affect the legacy WS builder used by character; verdict identical to baseline. Text read via UIAutomation DOM snapshot; no screenshot saved. No console errors observed.
